name: MembershipTierAssigner

neutralConcepts: requestedTier NOT in input shape — client-submitted tier ignored

ironRules.rule: requestedTier must NOT appear in T100 input shape. Client-submitted tier values are untrusted and enable privilege escalation.
assignedTier derived from xiigen-subscriptions (GLOBAL scope) lookup — not from request payload.
Output must be { assignedTier, accessLevels[], subscriptionId } — not just a tier string. accessLevels[] drives T105 query filter.

keywords: membership tier assigner server side subscription authority requestedTier forbidden accessLevels
